weylSymbolStatus.label: Weyl symbol fixed
weylSymbolStatus.reason: The symbol sigma_omega is fixed in the same Weyl convention as the KLM theorem.

coordinateKernelTransportStatus.label: coordinate Weyl kernel transport
coordinateKernelTransportStatus.reason: The coordinate kernel K_omega is the standard Weyl integral kernel associated with sigma_omega.  Therefore the quadratic form of K_omega equals <Op^W(sigma_omega)f,f>.

proof: Start from the fixed Weyl quantization formula for Op^W(sigma_omega).
Integrate in the momentum variable to obtain the coordinate kernel K_omega.
Apply Fubini on the Weyl test domain to identify the two quadratic forms.
